title: oleandra nodosa
intro: Oleandra nodosa, also known as the golden snake plant or the elephant ear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit platelet aggregation and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oleandra nodosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal properties. Oleandra nodosa is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as in capsule or tablet form, and is used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, including Asia and the Pacific Islands.
